reason: 投稿の多くがS&P500の大幅下落、関税によるインフレショックや憲法危機の可能性、リセッション確率の30%超を強調しており、2026年の市場環境を極めて厳しいものと見なしている。一部の投稿でバブルリスクの緩和や長期回復のシナリオが触れられるものの、全体としてクラッシュや修正の警告が支配的で、投資家にとって警戒を促す内容だ。過去のクラッシュ比較からも、さらなる下落リスクが高いと分析される。
key_signals: 関税導入によるマージン崩壊とインフレ加速
リセッション確率の急上昇（~30%）と成長鈍化
S&P500の10-20%超の下落予測と抵抗線拒否
content:
### 検索結果: S&P500 tariff recession risk 2026 に関する最新のX投稿

X（旧Twitter）でキーワード「S&P500 tariff recession risk 2026」に関連する最新投稿をセマンティック検索で調べました。2026年1月1日から4月10日までの投稿を対象に、関連度の高いものを抽出しました。以下に、原文（Content）と投稿URLをリストアップします。URLはXの標準形式（https://x.com/ユーザー名/status/投稿ID）です。投稿は時系列の最新順（新しいものから）で並べています。メディア付きのものは記述に含めていますが、原文はテキストのみです。

1. **投稿日時**: 2026-04-08 20:01:27 GMT  
   **原文**: S&P 500 fwd P/E –17% = typical “growth‑fear” reset. Compares to mfg slow‑down –15%, tariff –20%, well below Fed tightening –29% / COVID –31%. No recession, no rate‑hike cycle → bubble risk largely released. #SPX #valuation (メディア: 画像あり)  
   **URL**: https://x.com/SFA_Xcom/status/2041969694220153136

2. **投稿日時**: 2026-04-07 03:57:00 GMT  
   **原文**: S&P 500 down 4.6% YTD. Oil up 66%. Tariffs at 12%. Fed frozen. Most dangerous macro cocktail since 2008. And retail is still holding meme stocks. Good luck out there.  
   **URL**: https://x.com/GiuliaTrades/status/2041364592505557424

3. **投稿日時**: 2026-04-09 13:52:51 GMT  
   **原文**: Read the chain Higher oil → higher inflation higher inflation → higher rates higher rates → lower growth At same time debt costs exploding That combination pushes recession probability toward ~30% https://polymarket.com/event/us-recession-by-end-of-2026?via=rich  
   **URL**: https://x.com/rektspecter/status/2042239319423832511

4. **投稿日時**: 2026-03-29 10:10:00 GMT  
   **原文**: 2008 GFC Crash: ▫️ S&P 500 dumped 20%, then pumped 14% before another 53% drop. 2020 Covid Crash: ▫️ $SPX dumped 15%, then pumped 9% before another 30% drop. 2025 Tariffs Crash: ▫️ SPX dumped 10%, then pumped 5% before another 16% drop. 2026 Dump: ▫️ SPX has dropped 9% and could drop a bit more. After that a relief rally will happen, followed by another leg down. (メディア: 画像あり)  
   **URL**: https://x.com/TedPillows/status/2038196970393846129

5. **投稿日時**: 2026-03-25 14:07:40 GMT  
   **原文**: Hard to believe looking at the index but we have retraced further than the multiple contraction during the tariff tantrum. We are actually all the way down near 2022 lows levels. For those who believe we need to pull back significantly more, the combination of substantial re-rating, significant degrossing, and hedging creates a powerful state that could potentially allow us to climb back higher. Keep in mind we could be in the formation of a bubble similar to 1997-98 when the market pulled back 20%+ a few times. The war is overshadowing the underlying technological boom. (メディア: 画像あり)  
   **URL**: https://x.com/TheShortBear/status/2036807231241404879

6. **投稿日時**: 2026-03-15 11:10:28 GMT  
   **原文**: Just like $BTC, the S&P 500 has gone down 15%-20% during mid-term election years. Also, SPX got rejected from its 8-year resistance trendline, which could result in a prolonged correction. IMO, SPX could drop $5,600-$5,800 in 2026 before reversal. (メディア: 画像あり)  
   **URL**: https://x.com/TedPillows/status/2033138758040637559

7. **投稿日時**: 2026-02-10 20:29:18 GMT  
   **原文**: 🚨 TRUMP 2026 MARKET PLAN JUST GOT LEAKED!! Many people expect markets to rally in 2026. But they are WRONG. Stocks, crypto, and real estate are at risk. There will be panic like nothing we’ve seen before. If you hold any assets right now, you MUST know what’s coming next: 1⃣ THE CRASH The U.S. economy is already weakening: → Layoffs are rising → Bankruptcies are increasing → Credit defaults are building → Housing demand is collapsing → Home sellers far outnumber buyers Because of this, a market correction in the next 2–3 months is very possible, similar to Q1 2025. If that happens: → S&P 500 could fall 10%–15% → Nasdaq could fall 15%–20% Crypto won’t decouple. It will fall harder, with potential capitulation. 2⃣ THE BLAME During the downturn, Trump is expected to shift blame to Powell. And possibly the Supreme Court if tariffs are blocked. Jerome Powell’s term ends in May 2026, making him an easy target. The narrative will be clear: → Powell didn’t cut rates → Powell kept policy tight → Powell didn’t inject liquidity as markets weakened The goal is to ensure Powell does not remain on the Board of Governors after his term as Chair ends. Trump knows that if Powell stays, he could still influence policy and complicate decisions for Kevin Warsh. 3⃣ THE EASING Once Powell exits and Kevin Warsh becomes Fed Chair, easing begins. Warsh has already signaled openness to tools like yield curve control, capping long-term yields and lowering borrowing costs. Cheaper borrowing = more liquidity. More liquidity = higher asset prices. At the same time, other liquidity drivers could align: → A potential $2,000 tariff dividend → Large tax cuts → Approval of pro-crypto laws like the CLARITY Act The objective is clear: support stocks and crypto. 4⃣ THE ELECTION U.S. midterm elections are in Q4 2026, and betting markets currently show Republicans losing ground. If markets are rising and cash is flowing to consumers, election odds can shift quickly. Once prices move higher, markets forget the pain. Dividend checks and tax cuts boost small business earnings. Powell becomes the convenient scapegoat for prior damage. The sequence: Early 2026 → Correction + blame Powell Mid 2026 → New Fed + liquidity easing Late 2026 → Market recovery into elections The next few months may be rough. After that, accumulation begins with a stronger rally into Q3–Q4 2026. I’ve been calling Bitcoin tops and bottoms for over a decade. And I’ll do it again in 2026. Follow and turn on notifications before it's too late. (メディア: 画像あり)  
   **URL**: https://x.com/CryptoNobler/status/2021320594080317587

8. **投稿日時**: 2026-01-19 17:09:02 GMT  
   **原文**: 🚨 TARIFFS WILL CRASH THE MARKET NO MATTER WHAT And tomorrow could be the worst day of 2026 yet… Most people don’t know this, but: Tariffs stays = DOWN Tariffs gone = DOWN THERE IS NO WIN SCENARIO. If you hold stocks or any assets, you need to pay attention to this. Before we even talk about tariffs, look at where we are standing. – The "Buffett Indicator" (Market Cap to GDP) just hit ~224%. That’s an all-time record. It’s higher than the Dot-Com bubble peak (~150%) and higher than the 2021 top. – The Shiller P/E is hovering near 40. We have only seen this ONCE in 150 years… right before the 2000 crash. The market is priced for utopia. It can’t handle a 1% miss, let alone a trade war. Here’s where things get worse… 1. THE "GREENLAND" ESCALATION: 10% tariffs on European allies (France, Germany, UK, etc.) effective Feb 1. This is a direct hit to the bottom line of multinationals trading at 22x earnings. 2. THE CONSTITUTIONAL CRISIS: Rumors are circulating that the Supreme Court is about to rule Trump’s IEEPA tariffs are ILLEGAL. Someone who’s been here for years already knows: THERE IS NO BULLISH OUTCOME. Let me explain. SCENARIO A: The Tariffs Stick (Inflation Shock) – Margins COLLAPSE. Companies cannot pass 10-20% cost hikes to a tapped-out consumer, so they eat it. – History Lesson: When Bush imposed steel tariffs in 2002, steel-consuming industries lost 200,000 jobs… more than the entire steel industry employed. The market hated it. – In 2018, tariff threats caused immediate sell-offs (CAC 40 lost 1.7% in a day, Apple dropped 2.6%). The math is terminal: 2026 earnings estimates are ~15% too high. SCENARIO B: The Tariffs Are Illegal (Insolvency Shock) – This is the "Refund Nightmare." If voided, the U.S. government technically owes BILLIONS in refunds to importers. – The 1930 Ghost: We are rhyming with Smoot-Hawley. In 1930, the market crashed 16% before the bill was even signed, just on anticipation. – If the court rules against Trump, the administration won't fold. They will trigger Section 232 or executive orders to block refunds. – Markets hate legal chaos and insolvency risk MORE than they hate taxes. We are either facing a margin-crushing trade war OR a constitutional crisis over fiscal solvency. This is a KNOWN UNKNOWN. I know this is hard for new investors to hear, but 20+ years in this game teaches you one thing. Amateurs pray for the rally to continue, and the pros pray for the floor to drop out. Wealth isn't made at the top, it's made when everyone else is too scared to buy. Keep in mind, I’ve called every major market top and bottom over the last decade. When I make my next move (very soon), I’ll post it here for everyone to see. If you want to OUTPERFORM retail, all you have to do is follow me. You’ll wish you followed me sooner, trust me. Btw, if you want my $0-$1M guide, comment "GUIDE" and check your DMs. (メディア: 画像あり)  
   **URL**: https://x.com/NoLimitGains/status/2013297663618195857

これらの投稿は、S&P500の変動、関税（tariff）の影響、リセッション（recession）のリスク、2026年の市場予測を中心に議論しています。より詳細なコンテキストが必要な投稿があれば、追加でツールを使ってスレッドを取得可能です。
